Issue: No skip-to-content link
Impact: Keyboard users must tab through full nav every page
RecommendedFix: Add skip link and focusable main target

Issue: Text mojibake artifacts reduced readability
Impact: Users may think site is broken
RecommendedFix: Replace corrupted glyph sequences and normalize punctuation

Issue: Form appeared functional without backend flow
Impact: Trust drop and perceived failure
RecommendedFix: Prevent default submit and show explicit coming-soon status

Issue: EFT and PayFast language was jargon-heavy
Impact: Users may select wrong method or abandon checkout
RecommendedFix: Simplify option labels and guidance copy

Issue: PayFast confirmation and EFT guidance were vague
Impact: Users blocked before order placement
RecommendedFix: Rewrite payment-step helper text in plain language

Issue: Success message too dense and hard to scan
Impact: Users miss key billing/delivery details
RecommendedFix: Shorten and structure outcome notes

Issue: Empty states lacked plain next-step wording
Impact: Unclear what to do next
RecommendedFix: Rewrite empty/error states with clear next action hints

Issue: Menu toggle lacked explicit dynamic aria-label
Impact: Reduced screen-reader clarity
RecommendedFix: Add open/close aria-label on toggle button

Issue: Admin sign-in copy was generic
Impact: First-time admins may not know capabilities
RecommendedFix: Clarify scope of admin actions in intro text

Issue: Smooth forced scroll on route change can disorient
Impact: Motion discomfort and slower orientation
RecommendedFix: Use immediate scroll reset on route change

Issue: No runtime walkthrough completed in this pass
Impact: Gated regressions may remain undetected
RecommendedFix: Run customer credential walkthrough on mobile and desktop

Issue: No runtime walkthrough completed in this pass
Impact: Payment blockers may remain undetected
RecommendedFix: Run signed-link and signed-in fallback tests

Issue: No runtime walkthrough with real admin session in this pass
Impact: Operational blockers may remain undetected
RecommendedFix: Run full admin workflow test with seeded data

Issue: No runtime walkthrough completed in this pass
Impact: Validation and modal edge cases may remain
RecommendedFix: Run full create/edit/delete and address-edit walkthrough

Issue: Focus trap and return focus not fully verified runtime
Impact: Accessibility regressions can slip to production
RecommendedFix: Add modal keyboard E2E checks and manual matrix

Issue: Inline help consistency varies across forms
Impact: Higher completion time and avoidable errors
RecommendedFix: Define shared help-text and validation pattern

Issue: Not all no-data states include direct CTA buttons
Impact: Users may stall with no action path
RecommendedFix: Add route-specific CTA buttons in all empty states

Issue: Information density may overload smaller screens
Impact: Slower task completion and data-entry mistakes
RecommendedFix: Add compact mode and section anchors for mobile

Issue: Error copy format inconsistent between pages
Impact: Users must re-interpret each form pattern
RecommendedFix: Standardize concise error message templates

Issue: CTA verb style varies across routes
Impact: Mild cognitive friction
